RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
Owner: PMO | Date: 2026-04-15 | Status: AMBER

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
This RAID log captures cross-functional risks across the SDLC for the
clinic A pilot integration, leveraging best-in-class PM frameworks to
deliver enterprise-grade visibility into the project's risk posture.

RISKS
R1 | API integration risk
    Description: Cross-cutting concerns across the vendor integration layer
                 require holistic stakeholder alignment to operationalize.
    Owner: Tech Lead
    Mitigation: Leverage industry best practices and apply a phased
               approach to risk reduction.

R2 | Resource constraint risk
    Description: Capacity dynamics in Q2 may impact velocity and throughput
                 across the workstreams.
    Owner: Eng Manager
    Mitigation: Implement a strategic resource allocation framework.

R3 | Stakeholder alignment risk
    Description: Multi-stakeholder ecosystem requires synchronized
                 communication touchpoints to drive convergence.
    Owner: PO
    Mitigation: Operationalize a robust stakeholder engagement model.

R4 | Compliance risk
    Description: Regulatory landscape evolution may necessitate
                 reprioritization of compliance-related deliverables.
    Owner: Compliance lead
    Mitigation: Continuously align with regulatory frameworks.

R5 | Quality risk
    Description: End-to-end quality assurance across the SDLC requires
                 a comprehensive QA strategy.
    Owner: QA Lead
    Mitigation: Embed QA into the DevSecOps pipeline.

ISSUES
I1 | Cross-functional alignment opportunity
    Owner: PMO
    Action: Conduct stakeholder synergy workshop.

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 | Cross-functional teams will operationalize agreed frameworks.
A2 | Stakeholder ecosystem will remain aligned to delivery cadence.

DEPENDENCIES
D1 | Vendor ecosystem
    Owner: Vendor relations
D2 | Internal capability matrix
    Owner: Capability lead

KPIs: TBD
RACI: see appendix (not attached)
